overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character with a weapon on his back walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels along a paved path past a green-roofed kiosk, through dense pine woods, and across a wooden bridge. The atmosphere is tense with artificial lighting from street lamps and a cool blue color palette.

events.description: character passes the green-roofed information kiosk on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path toward the green-roofed kiosk with weapon on back

entered.detail: small structure with green metal roof and information boards on the front
bulletin board with papers attached to the kiosk front
tall pole with dual lamps illuminating the path
smooth asphalt trail winding through the forest
dense evergreen forest canopy surrounding the trail
mountain silhouette visible through tree gaps in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved forest trail at night, approaching a green-roofed information kiosk. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path, and an outdoor light pole illuminates the right side. The distant mountains are visible through the trees on the left as the character passes the kiosk.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding forest path through dense pine woods

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the forest, leaving the kiosk behind. The path winds through dense pine trees with limited sky visibility, maintaining a steady pace along the asphalt trail with mountains occasionally visible through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching wooden bridge and settlement

events.description: wooden fence and covered structure come into view as approaching the bridge area

agents.ego_description: walking toward a wooden bridge with fence-lined path and covered structure visible ahead

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence lining the right side of the path
open-sided wooden shelter with roof near the trail
wooden footbridge with railings crossing the path ahead
multiple lamp posts illuminating the bridge approach

segments.scene_description: The trail approaches a wooden settlement area with a covered structure on the left and wooden fencing on the right. Multiple outdoor light poles become visible, illuminating the path toward a wooden bridge ahead as the ground transitions from asphalt to dirt.

events.description: character steps onto the wooden bridge, surface changes from dirt to wooden planks

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge with railings on both sides, heading toward the forest continuation

entered.detail: planked wooden surface of the bridge underfoot
log railings along the left side of the bridge
log railings along the right side of the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto a wooden footbridge, transitioning from the dirt trail to wooden planks. The bridge has wooden railings on both sides and leads toward the continuation of the forest path on the other side, with artificial lighting illuminating the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark pine forest that transitions from a paved trail into a rustic wooden settlement. It begins with the character walking along an asphalt path illuminated by a street lamp, passing a green-roofed information kiosk with distant mountains visible through the trees. As the character moves deeper into the woods, the path winds through a dense canopy of pines that limits the view of the sky. The scene then shifts as the asphalt gives way to a dirt trail, opening up into a settlement area marked by wooden fencing, covered structures, and a series of outdoor light poles. Finally, the camera follows the character as they step off the dirt and cross a wooden footbridge with railings, leading back into the forest under the glow of artificial lighting.
